tagline: UAE + International ERP, software and digital transformation partner
heroTitle: Odoo ERP, Software & Digital Transformation for Growing Businesses
heroText: AimAze Tech Solutions helps UAE and international companies implement Odoo ERP, automate workflows, improve reporting, and build scalable digital systems around real business operations.
services: Module planning, configuration, migration, training and go-live support for CRM, sales, finance, HR, inventory and operations.
Custom workflows, dashboards, approvals, automated reports and business-specific modules.
Lead management, pipeline stages, follow-ups, quotation workflow and management visibility.
CFO dashboards, receivable tracking, margin reporting, VAT workflows and KPI visibility.
Professional business websites, portals, internal tools and web applications.
Process review, automation roadmaps, integration planning and long-term support.
process: We study your current process, pain points, reports and required controls.
We map the right Odoo modules, workflows, roles and dashboards.
We configure, customize, migrate data and test with your users.
We train your team and keep improving the system after go-live.
why: We understand finance, controls, operations and management reporting, not only software screens.
We focus on the right configuration and customization for real workflows.
Open-source flexibility with professional implementation and support.
We stay involved after launch for training, improvements and optimization.
faq: Can you implement Odoo Community Edition?
Yes. We can work with Odoo Community Edition and customize it according to business requirements.
Yes. UAE is a primary target market, and we also support international clients remotely.
Can you build dashboards for finance and management?
Yes. We can design CFO dashboards, receivable reports, sales KPIs, margin reports and operational views.
Can I change website content later?
Yes. This package includes a local visual admin editor that exports updated content.json.
